input_row.title: Ensure App Service Environment has TLS cipher suite ordering configured
input_row.remediation: Remediate from Azure Portal 1. Go to Resource Explorer. 2. Locate an App Service Environment from the left pane. 3. In the right pane, click Read/Write to allow editing. 4. Click Edit to edit the resource. 5. Update the clusterSettings attribute to include: { "name": "FrontEndSSLCipherSuiteOrder", "value": "TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384,TLS_AES_128_GCM_SHA256,TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_2 56_GCM_SHA384,TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256" } 6. Click PUT to commit the change. 7. Repeat steps 1-7 for each App Service Environment requiring remediation. Default Value: TLS cipher suite ordering is not configured by default. References: 1. https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/app-service/environment/app-service- app-service-environment-custom-settings 2. https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/cli/azure/appservice/ase CIS Controls:
input_row.reference: 1. https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/app-service/environment/app-service- app-service-environment-custom-settings 2. https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/cli/azure/appservice/ase CIS Controls: Controls Version Control IG 1 IG 2 IG 3 v8 3.10 Encrypt Sensitive Data in Transit Encrypt sensitive data in transit. Example implementations can include: Transport Layer Security (TLS) and Open Secure Shell (OpenSSH). ● ● v7 14.4 Encrypt All Sensitive Information in Transit Encrypt all sensitive information in transit.  ● ●  3 Azure Container Instances This section covers security best practice recommendations for Azure Container Instances. Help us improve this Benchmark! If you notice a needed correction, want to provide feedback, or wish to contribute security best practice guidance please join our community and create a ticket, propose a change, or start a discussion so we can improve this guidance! The CIS Microsoft Azure Community is here: https://workbench.cisecurity.org/communities/72. gpt_response:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Automated

**APPROACH DECISION:** 
The control can be fully verified via Azure Resource Manager APIs/CLI/SDK/PowerShell. The detailed steps provided for remediation reference methods that can be executed through the Azure Portal or CLI, indicating that these properties should be exposed via Azure APIs.

**PROGRAM NAME:** azure_app_service_environment_tls_cipher_suite_ordering_configured

**AUTOMATION DETAILS:** 
The automated program would check the following:

1. **Azure Resource Manager APIs or Azure CLI commands to use:**
   - Azure CLI command: 
     ```bash
     az appservice environment show --name <app_service_environment_name> --resource-group <resource_group_name>
     ```

2. **Specific resources to enumerate:**
   - Iterate over all App Service Environments (ASE) within specified subscriptions or resource groups.

3. **Exact configuration properties/settings to validate:**
   - Examine the `clusterSettings` attribute for the App Service Environment to verify the `FrontEndSSLCipherSuiteOrder` setting.
   - Expected value should include the cipher suites:
     ```json
     {
       "name": "FrontEndSSLCipherSuiteOrder",
       "value": "TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384,TLS_AES_128_GCM_SHA256,TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384,TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256"
     }
     ```

4. **Clear Pass/Fail criteria with expected values:**
   - **Pass:** The `clusterSettings` for `FrontEndSSLCipherSuiteOrder` matches the expected secure configuration as specified above.
   - **Fail:** The property is either not present, configured with different values, or the `clusterSettings` is missing entirely.

5. **Example API endpoint or CLI command:**
   - Example Azure CLI command for querying existing settings:
     ```bash
     az appservice environment update --name <app_service_environment_name> --resource-group <resource_group_name> --set clusterSettings.[0].name=FrontEndSSLCipherSuiteOrder clusterSettings.[0].value="TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384,TLS_AES_128_GCM_SHA256,TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384,TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256"
     ```

This structure allows for a comprehensive automated check for compliance with the specified control around TLS cipher suite ordering in App Service Environments.
